Package grafiosch.common

package grafiosch.common
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    grafiosch
     
  • Class
    Description
    CSVImportHelper
    Utility class providing common CSV import functionality for mapping CSV headers to entity fields and parsing CSV data lines into entity objects.
    DataHelper
    Utility class providing helper methods for data manipulation and reflection.
    DateHelper
     
    DynamicFormField
    Marks an entity field as a participant in a dynamically generated input form and carries the metadata required to place and render it.
    DynamicFormPropertySupport
    Annotation used to specify additional form property helpers for dynamic form generation.
    EnumHelper
    Utility class for operations on Enum types, particularly those implementing the StableEnum interface.
    FieldColumnMapping
    Represents a mapping between a CSV column index and an entity field for import operations.
    ImportDataRequired
    Marks a field as required during CSV import operations.
    LockedWhenUsed
    Marks an entity field as immutable once the entity (or a related entity) is in active use.
    NetworkHelper
     
    PropertyAlwaysUpdatable
    Annotation that marks a field as always updatable by users in the application.
    PropertyChangePassword
    Used for changing password only
    PropertyOnlyCreation
    This property can only updated by the user when the entity is created.
    PropertySelectiveUpdatableOrWhenNull
    User can update this property.
    PropertyStringParser
    Parser for PropertyString format: "KEY1=VALUE1,KEY2=VALUE2".
    UpdateQuery
    Meta-Annotation, @Transactional, @Modifying and @Query combined.
    UserAccessHelper
    Helper class for checking user access rights and roles in relation to entities.
    ValueFormatConverter
    Utility class for converting string values to appropriate data types and setting them on bean properties.
